item.title: If you find "Android System SafetyCore" on your Android device, remove it right away.
item.description:
Source: https://www.digitaltrends.com/computing/googles-new-policy-tracks-all-your-devices-with-no-opt-out/ Note: this article isn't specifically what the proceeding content is about; just relevant.
You will not find it on the store, but if you follow this link, you can find if it is installed and remove it: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.google.android.safetycore&hl=en-US @JamesTDG made a wiki page about it here: https://wiki.rossmanngroup.com/wiki/Android_System_SafetyCore
More discussion: https://old.reddit.com/r/degoogle/comments/1iu0wr0/anybody_here_know_if_this_is_true_supposedly/ If there is an article that seems important but you cannot read, do not give up. Copy the title and put it in a search engine to find and alternative source that has pulled that story's text. archive.ph often allows you to put an address to the article to bypass this. To make things even simpler, there are block lists that you can add to UBlock to open these documents directly. You can use these links on PC, Mac and Android. You can drop this filter list directly into UBlock and it will allow you through (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/liamengland1/miscfilters/refs/heads/master/antipaywall.txt). This list is updated regularly, with an update just two days ago. I will provide a video that shows how to do this however, due to the compression methods here, it shows up a bit low quality but it is enough to easily figure it out. (https://imgur.com/gallery/land-of-free-to-yuh-72f1Fuq) It's recommended to use a browser other than Chrome in order to navigate. Recently, Google has been combatting against ad blockers (convenient, huh?) and from what I understand, they have removed extensions. Some on previous versions may still have access but it is only temporary and deemed unreliable on that basis. --------------------------------------------------------------------- http://old.reddit.com/r/politics https://old.reddit.com/r/politics/new/ (latest; often unverified. Be cautious) --------------------------------------------------------------------- NeatURL is an extension to help remove clutter and tracking from urls (https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/neat-url/). ClearURL is also an alternative (however I haven't tried it, it's #1 in the store) https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/clearurls/ If you're okay with manually enabling/disabling what is displayed, I recommend NoScript Security Suite to put full control into your hands. Note, it can be bothersome at first, but once you set permissions on each page that you visit frequently, you don't have to mess around with doing it over and over. Protection isn't meant to be convenient in this age, unfortunately. https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/noscript/ XCancelled will forward you to Twitter comments outside of the environment, allowing you to view information without being signed in. This is incredibly useful for news stories that contain "Tweets" so you can see their comments or download videos from their sources (with other tools) https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/nitter/ Load Reddit Images Directly does just that. Rather than clicking an image to slowly have it converted to a different format (many times unusable and needs to be converted back resulting in degradation), it will open in a new tab as .jpg https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/load-reddit-images-directly/ Chrome Mask will trick sites into thinking you're using Chrome for certain tasks. YouTube is a good example- to combat adblockers, they have limited their videos to those who they detect are using browsers that allow adblockers. There is a toggle switch for how you would like your browser to be announced. https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/chrome-mask Onetab is also useful but you can end up with tons and tons to "look over later" as I often do. https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/onetab/ Tab session manager- same as above. (I also have a hundreds here that I haven't gotten around to) https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/tab-session-manager/ For editing posts, if you do not have Photoshop, there is a browser-based alternative you can use completely for free with (practically) all of the bells and whistles. https://www.photopea.com/ If there is text on the screen and you cannot copy it, try Text-Grab. (my hotkey is alt+f) https://github.com/TheJoeFin/Text-Grab --------------------------------------------------------------------- Stay in the Fight! https://actionnetwork.org/forms/thank-you-for-taking-action-stay-in-the-fight/ Keep up with current threats: https://www.realtimefascism.com/ How far along are we to fascism? https://www.project2025.observer/ Another useful sub: https://old.reddit.com/r/Keep_Track/ Contact your representatives in Washington (yes, even if your representatives are Republicans. In fact, ESPECIALLY if they are) for any and all that concerns you. Here is a number for the Capitol switchboard, they'll patch you right through: (202)-224-3121 https://5calls.org/ On the Play store: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.a5calls.android.a5calls https://generalstrikeus.com/ Litigation Tracker: Legal Challenges to Trump Administration Actions https://www.justsecurity.org/107087/tracker-legal-challenges-trump-administration-actions/ Keep an eye on the Executive Actions & Legislation. Question each one. https://potustracker.us/ How much is he golfing? https://trumpgolftrack.com/ Pardons for criminals, by criminals (ongoing): https://www.justice.gov/pardon Pardons for criminals, by criminals (1st term): https://www.justice.gov/pardon/pardons-granted-president-donald-j-trump-2017-2021 Fox puppets laying out how to steal an election before actively commanding it: https://imgur.com/gallery/sQzDOlI Brought to you by: "The best people" https://www.dailykos.com/history/user/CajsaLilliehook

item.title: An unthemed dump of the things I send to the other clowns from my circus
item.description:
this meme has worked its way into my vocabulary in a very real way
Avoiding Lord Byron was a noble goal
Actual Cannibal Shia Labeouf remains a banger all these long years later
I would buy this table
him drink tha soup

item.title: Images of Note: HomuncuLuigi
item.description:
8C
GOOD LORD
outrageous
Used to own that mug, now it's in an underground facility in a remote Scottish Mountain.
HomuncuLuigi
You installed Windows 11, that is why.
I think it's confusion, like imagine you see actual Mermaids.
We need to shave Former President George W. Bush for what he did.
Ok
I'm sure we'll get it right, Gen Beta are defo going to be the worst people alive.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky http://onlyfans.abbii.gay: for Tips!

item.dc:creator: inkican

item.title: Getting paid to feed faces to leopards
item.description: Got a pile of emails from our suppliers and manufacturers, explicitly stating that they're raising prices on materials DUE TO THE TARIFFS, and to expect price instability moving forward. As a small business we're going to lose some money on the projects we already bid last year that haven't broken ground yet, but the boss/owner voted for this dumbassery too, so... I'm now sorta getting paid by the hour to feed faces to leopards, and... I don't feel bad. ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
item.dc:creator: skapanda616

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Despite everything, this little girl still thinks the safest place in the world is next to me.
item.description: Story's bloodwork came back today. Everything was normal, except her liver enzyme levels which were high. Tomorrow I'm picking up liver supplements, dropping off urine and stool samples, and waiting to hear back on her urinalysis results. She's been eating a little, using the litter box, and all-in-all letting me know she's not feeling great. We're going to bed early tonight so she can get some sleep. I probably need it too. They recommended getting her liver ultrasounded to rule out any foreign masses, see how her lymphnodes look, etc. The earliest they can do it is this coming Thursday. It'll require her to be dropped off and picked up later in the day, so another stressful day for Story and I. They quoted it at $680. At this point the numbers don't matter. Swipe my card until it starts smoking. I'll sell the rest of my cash registers to make her feel normal again. Thanks to those of you who chipped in with the bills these past several days. They're ultimately my responsibility to take care of, but I still appreciate how much love this little ball of fur and attitude has beyond just me and my family. If she knew she had friends like you, she'd never let me live it down. <3
item.dc:creator: ElbowDeepInAHorse

item.title: My s-s-sixteenth favorite!

item.dc:creator: beardata07

item.title: 2 bighorn sheep walked right past me this week
item.description: I was out near this bridge, talking about doing some improvements to the site, when these two boys showed up. They were skittish at first, and even looked like they were about to call off the crossing and go back the way they came, but my group moved off to the side and they decided it was safe. They went into a trot for a couple of steps as they were directly across from us, which you can see in shot #8. This is the Taos Junction bridge in the Rio Grande Gorge near Taos, NM, at 36.33612°, -105.73391°
item.dc:creator: JJohnston94

item.title: Is imgur supporting right-wing extremists now?
item.description: It's 2 days before the election in Germany and imgur shows advertisements for the extreme right wing party AFD under every post I am looking at, today... Imgur, what the heck is wrong with you?
